description_long: This sports car features a low, aerodynamic profile with a striking black and orange striped paint scheme that gives it a bold, aggressive appearance. The body is streamlined with sharp, angular contours and a partially open cockpit, suggesting a lightweight, performance-oriented design. Large, rugged tires with deep treads are mounted on prominent wheel arches, enhancing its sporty and robust look. The front end is equipped with dual headlights and a low-slung nose, while the rear showcases a compact, tapered tail section. The side view reveals exposed suspension components and a minimalistic, race-inspired interior. The overall design emphasizes speed, agility, and a futuristic aesthetic suitable for urban racing or high-performance driving.
description: A sleek, black and orange striped sports car with a low, aerodynamic body, large rugged wheels, and a partially open cockpit. Its aggressive styling and exposed components highlight its performance-oriented, futuristic design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the low nose, dual headlights, and wide stance with bold orange and black stripes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the open cockpit, exposed suspension, and large, deeply treaded wheels.
description_view_2: Top-down view reveals the full striped pattern, cockpit opening, and the car's compact, streamlined shape.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the angular bodywork, open cockpit, and wheel details.
attribute_wheel_design: solid black wheels with minimal visible spokes and deep treaded tires
